title: The Worn-Out Dancing Shoes
lines: A king had twelve daughters who shared a bedchamber.
Every night their shoes were found to be worn out and torn, though no one knew where they went.
The king offered a reward to anyone who could discover the secret.
At last a soldier volunteered to solve the mystery.
An old woman gave him an enchanted cloak of invisibility.
Wearing it, he followed the princesses and discovered they danced all night in an underground palace.
He reported his findings to the king.
The king asked his daughters to confess, and they revealed that they had been under an evil enchantment.
With the soldier's help, the spell was broken.
The soldier chose the eldest princess as his bride.
They were married and lived happily together.
